name: BB:UBA : Disabled Accounts (Kerberos)
notes: Detects when any expired account,  disabled by an Admin, tries to log on to the Organization network
bb_references: BB:UBA : Disabled Accounts (Kerberos) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log

when the event QID is one of the following (5000584) Failure Audit: Kerberos pre-authentication failed, (5000586) Failure Audit: A Kerberos service ticket request failed, (5000582) Failure Audit: A Kerberos service ticket was rejected
when any of Status Code (custom) match 0x12
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Disabled Accounts (Kerberos) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log

AND when the event QID is one of the following (5000584) Failure Audit: Kerberos pre-authentication failed, (5000586) Failure Audit: A Kerberos service ticket request failed, (5000582) Failure Audit: A Kerberos service ticket was rejected
AND when any of Status Code (custom) match 0x12
